title: Bakery Villager Trader
description: introduces a new villager, the Baker Trader, along with his bakery house
body:
This Mod adds a new villager to the game, the Bakery Villager Trader.

You will be able to find him in his Bakery House which can spawn in plains biomes

You can also get the new trader by placing the new traderblock as his workstation.
![baker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l5hEvOhx/images/11da187e6bb83c378bf6deb126c6068734ae0135.png)

**The major features include:**

-  Bakery structure to explore, loot and trade.
-  New baker villager profession with new custom trades
-  Bread armor set, tools and sword
-  4 new food items all of them will give you an effect
-  flying bread mob
